$comment: Profile scope template. The Steward copies this file as the SEED for handoffs/current-scope.json when ratifying a workstream under this profile, then fills every <PLACEHOLDER> and adds workstream specifics. Fields already filled here are the profile's standing policy — the Steward may tighten them, never weaken them. Hooks read allowedGlobs/forbiddenGlobs/proofRequirements; extra fields are constitution-level guidance.
targetRepo: <remote URL / owner-repo identity of the target repo; omit only if the work targets AgenticTeam itself>
targetCanonical: <absolute path to the user's ORIGINAL checkout — READ-ONLY to agents; never edited. Used only as the reference to fetch/verify against and to clone/worktree from>
targetWorktree: <absolute path to the isolated copy where the Builder actually works, named '<target repo name> copy for EM'. All allowed/forbidden globs are relative to THIS root. The Builder creates it (git worktree preferred) if absent and verifies it per the constitution's Target isolation rule>
preconditions: <state that must hold BEFORE the Builder starts: which branch to start from, what must have landed, what must be ratified. The Builder verifies these first and stops if unmet>
allowedGlobs: <paths the Builder/Sweeper may edit — keep narrow>
rollbackAnchor: <git tag/branch created before first Builder edit>
stopConditions: Builder stops when proofs run and handoff is written; does not merge
Sweeper stops if baseline suite is red
Any agent stops immediately if work requires editing a forbiddenGlob
